name: StepInputComponent
description: Set of fields of FormItemControl component

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets input aria-label attribute

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets input aria-labelledby attribute

inputs.name: ariaRoleDescription
inputs.description: Aria defines role description for the Step Input.

inputs.name: compact
inputs.description: Sets compact mode

inputs.name: currency
inputs.description: Currency used to format value. Check Intl.NumberFormat documentation for more information

inputs.name: currencyDisplay
inputs.description: Currency used to format value. Check Intl.NumberFormat documentation for more information

inputs.name: decrementButtonIcon
inputs.description: Sets icon displayed in Decrement Button

inputs.name: disableWheel
inputs.description: Whether the wheel event should be disabled. Default value is false

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Sets control in disabled mode

inputs.name: hasStepButtons
inputs.description: Whether StepInput should display Increase/Decrease buttons

inputs.name: incrementButtonIcon
inputs.description: Sets icon displayed in Increment Button

inputs.name: inputId
inputs.description: Sets input id

inputs.name: inputTitle
inputs.description: Sets input title attribute

inputs.name: isFullWidth
inputs.description: Sets the Step Input to take the full width of the container element

inputs.name: locale
inputs.description: Sets locale used to format numeric value

inputs.name: localeMatcher
inputs.description: Specifies algorithm used to match locale. Check Intl.NumberFormat documentation for more information

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: Sets maximum value boundary

inputs.name: maxFractionDigits
inputs.description: Defines maximal number of fractional digits for control value

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: Sets minimum value boundary

inputs.name: minFractionDigits
inputs.description: Defines minimal number of fractional digits for control value

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Sets formatting mode

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Sets input name attribute

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Hint displayed inside input before user writes value

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Sets control in readonly mode

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: If it is mandatory field

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: Sets state of the control. Can be `success`, `error`, `warning`, `information` or blank for default.

inputs.name: stateMessage
inputs.description: Holds the message with respect to state

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: Sets input step value

inputs.name: textAlign
inputs.description: Horizontally aligns value inside input

inputs.name: unit
inputs.description: Custom unit displayed as a label next to the input

inputs.name: useGrouping
inputs.description: Whether to use grouping when formatting value

outputs.name: onFocusIn
outputs.description: Emits event when input gets focused

outputs.name: onFocusOut
outputs.description: Emits event when input loses focus

outputs.name: valueChange
outputs.description: Emits new value when control value has changed

methods.name: decrement
methods.description: Decrement input value by step value

methods.name: increment
methods.description: Increment input value by step value
